inbound_message.subject: RFQ - HVAC Planned Maintenance Contract 2025-2026
inbound_message.body:
Hi team,

We would like to request a quote for our annual planned maintenance contract covering the following scope:

- Annual HVAC system inspection and service (full site, 12 units)
- Quarterly filter replacement (48 filters per visit, 4 visits)
- Emergency callout allowance (up to 8 hours included)

Contract start date: 1 August 2025. Site: Manchester city centre office, 6 floors.

Kind regards,
Claire Donovan
Facilities Manager - Meridian FM Ltd
Phone: +44 161 800 4422

line_items.raw_text: Annual HVAC system inspection and service - 12 units
Quarterly filter replacement - 48 filters per visit

routing_reasons: classify: request_type=service_quote - catalog match skipped, routed to human review
